title: Tieghemopanax murrayi
intro: Tieghemopanax murrayi, also known as Murray Tieghemopanax or Chinese Dragon's Blood Tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Araliaceae. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Tieghemopanax murrayi include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into a decoction, tincture, or powder, and is also used to make Dragon's Blood, a resinous sap that is used to treat various health conditions, including wounds and ulcers.
